changes.text: Moved Products over to SQL Database
Added Endpoints for Managing Produucts
Added Endpoints for Managing Categories
Added Product Management page with options to add, edit and delete products and categories
Added JWT Security to Shop related endpoints
Fixed jobs showing download when not applicable
Added ability to list Shop Items without a Category
Added custom Stripe checkout page for better themed payment handling
Fixed payment issue from an item not having a description
Added Order Model for more indepth order information
Fixed display issue with 'View Logs' on mobile device
Improved mobile display of Player page spacing / size
Moved the Status indiciator into the User Menu Dropdown
Added Tailwind Toolbars for matching toolbar themes
Added Basket System to the Shop
Changed Stripe and related handling to accept Basket Format
Fixed product count showing category count
Added fulfilmentMode to Products for display and Worker Processing
Added basket and fulfilment information to Order conclusion Page
Added Maanual Param to Job Payload for tracking manually applied fulfilment
Added Endpoint to Update Manual Job Payload Param to Completed
Added order endpoints (Get Orders / Get Order) with search, sorting, and permission handling
Added Orders page accessible via user menu, including admin mode to view all orders
Improved checkout return page with loading state, fulfilment job ID, and clearer messaging
Resolved search input lag caused by URL parameter updates (debounced local state)
Improved player page responsiveness and layout on smaller screens
Fixed JWT refresh flow where updated token was not applied to subsequent API requests
Refactored order basket handling to structured JSON for flexible item support
Added Stripe payment endpoints for shop transactions
Added store page for purchasing memberships and in-game perks, with products loaded from the API
Added Stripe checkout flow for processing payments
Added order endpoints for creating, updating, listing and retrieving orders
Added order fulfilment jobs to automatically apply memberships after successful payment
Moved project links into a dropdown menu in the navigation bar
Added pointer cursors to interactive elements for clearer UX
Fixed intermittent login refresh issues caused by duplicate callback handling
Fixed JWT authentication issues caused by outdated package versions
Added Steam / Openid integration and Steam Login endpoints
Added Sign in with Steam option to Login Modal
Added Steam Avatar and Link to Player Profile
Removed unnecessary backdrop-blur usage to improve scroll performance and responsiveness
Added consistent background containers to Project and About pages for improved layout and visual structure
Replaced top navigation with dropdown menu on mobile and tablet for improved responsiveness
Adjusted layout spacing for mobile to improve readability and reduce content compression

title: URL Params, Confirm box and QOL Fixes

changes.text: Added URL Param for showing Login modal (?login=true)
Added URL Param for showing Whitelisting panel on Player page (?whitelist=police)
Added URL Param handling for View Logs on Player page (?viewlogs=true)
Added frontend permission checks for View Logs. Limited to Admin Level 3+
Added backend permission checks to View Logs endpoint. Limited to Admin Level 3+
Improved error handling for Whitelisting and View Logs modals
Fixed 'Back to Search' button not always returning to Search
Updated 'Back to Search' to remember search params like Search, Page Number and Filters
Updated ApiFetch to support GET and POST with JWT handling and token refresh
Added reusable Input Modal component
Added reusable Confirm Modal component
Added username input prompt when generating credentials if username already exists
Added Confirm modals to Logout, User Management controls and Job controls
Added accountUsername and accountActive to GetPlayer endpoint for account management info
Added User Management logic to show only available actions (Generate, Disable, Reset)
Added badge to show account username and active/disabled status on Player page
Added Status filter buttons to Jobs page
Added live job monitoring with automatic refresh (7.5s idle / 2.5s when jobs are active).
Added 'Load New Jobs' button to prevent job list reordering while monitoring active jobs.
Fixed capitalization issue causing some permissions to not display correctly on user profiles.
Added temporary 10 second delay to job processing to allow visible active job monitoring on frontend.
Fixed pagination issue where current page could exceed total page count.
Added URL parameters for pagination and search to support refresh persistence, page sharing, and navigation.
Fixed group member parsing issue where only the first member was being handled correctly.
Added optional time parameter to FormatDate for HH:MM display.
Added audit logging to admin user management actions.
Added Jobs page layout (Similar to Stats), Data setup and Search / Pagination
Changed Job Download endpoint to include a direct param for download to allow better error handling on frontend
Changed Jobs Endpoint to return all jobs and allow, searching, pagination and status filters
Added Job Endpoints for Cancel, Toggle Priority and Duplicate
Added better error handling for Background Worker and Cancel Check
Added better formatting to the Logs Display and Variable Setup for Rank Updating
Added a search to the Logs Display
Added Search Param to GetLogs Endpoint
Added Player Names to Logs Endpoint via a JOIN
Added Search and Pagination to Logs Display
Fixed Admin Permissions missing for Test Users
Fixed Some Admin Permissions check inconsistencies
Fixed Logins being lost on refresh
Fixed Refreshing of JWT Token failing
Added Permission Variables to Refresh Token Endpoint
Fixed inconsistent Permission checking compared to backend
Added Constants and Permissions for easier updating
Added Master Constants for Admin, Faction and Other Permissions to be sent to Frontend
Added Global Permissions Variable that pulls from backend for more consistent and easier updating
Fixed null user causing crash on Logout
Added View Logs and Modal to View Players Logs from Profile
Added GetLogs Endpoint to retrieve a players Security related logs
Added Whitelisting modal to update a players Faction and Unit ranks
Fixed updateRank Endpoint for new Permission System
Added updateWhitelisting Endpoint for use with Whitelisting Modal
Fixed Cors loading order to fix token refresh not wokring
Added Loading Overlay and added to multiple areas
Fixed JWT Token Refresh (Wrong endpoint and incorrect token variable on re attempt)
Multiple Error handling changes / refeactoring null values to throw exceptions
Adding bunch of Example Players for better viewing and Range of User Accounts
Added Pagination to Stats Search Page
Added Total Rows Count to Paginated Data Returns (Get All Players, Search Player)
Added a range of user accounts for feature testing. Selectable on Login Popup
Added Breakdown page to provide more info into some of the core features and functionality
Added Home Page including Project Overview, About Me and Timeline
Added Docker Support
Added Docker Support
Added Endpoints for Login, Logout, Create User, Deactivate User, Reset Password, Change Password, and Refresh Tokens
Implemented BCrypt password hashing for secure credential storage
Added dynamic JWT claim mapping to provide permissions based on in-game ranks (Cop, Medic, and Individual Unit levels)
Implemented dual-token Auth (15-min JWT + GUID Refresh Token) with silent rotation via 401 interceptors and HttpOnly cookies
Implemented Global Auth Context to share user identity and permissions across the entire dashboard
Added 'System Authentication' portal with automatic session recovery on page load
Added 'Generate Credentials' for admins (Level 4+) to provision new users from Player Stats
Added 'Deactivate Access' for admins (Level 4+) to safely revoke user credentials via soft-delete
Added Force-Reset Password workflow triggered by admin-generated credentials
Added User Profile dropdown with 'Change Password' and 'View Service Record' actions
Added Theme variables across project for more consistency
Added Changelog Tab to view changes across the whole project
